introduction: We are here today to review the impact of our referral program on new patient acquisition in 2024. We will break down the results, trends and forecast potential growth.

subsections.heading: 2024 Referral Program Overview
subsections.content:
• The referral program was launched in Q2 2024 to attract new patients
• The program was promoted primarily through social media and email marketing
• Incentives offered included discounts on future consultations
• The program was managed by the customer relations department
• The referral process was automated through the MediConn app
• The referral program was well received with high user engagement
• The program was aligned with industry standards and regulations
subsections.justification: This content provides an overview of the referral program but does not specify how many new patients were registered. Strategy: Discusses procedural information.

subsections.heading: New Patient Registrations via Referral
subsections.content:
• Referrals became a major source of new patient registrations in 2024
• A significant proportion of new patients were introduced through existing patients
• The demographics of referred patients were diverse, with a majority in the 30-45 age bracket
• Feedback from referred patients indicated high satisfaction with the registration process
• Referred patients showed high engagement rates with our digital health services
• The customer relations team facilitated the integration of new referrals into our systems
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the impact of referrals on new patient registrations without specifying the number. Strategy: Highlights related metrics and activities.

subsections.heading: Referral Program Enhancements for Future Growth
subsections.content:
• Future enhancements to the program include expanding to more marketing channels
• The feedback loop will be improved for better understanding of patient needs
• The referral reward system will be optimized based on patient feedback
• We are considering partnerships with pharmacies for better reward offerings
• The app interface will be updated for easier referral process
• The registration process for referred patients will be further simplified
• The success metrics for the program will be reevaluated and updated
subsections.justification: This slide discusses future plans for the referral program but does not provide data on past performance. Strategy: Discusses future plans and processes.

conclusion: Our referral program has been instrumental in driving new patient registrations in 2024. To continue our growth, we should consider refining our referral strategies based on the insights gathered.

image_queries.slide_title: Referral Program Enhancements for Future Growth
